steps.title: Match the map's verb
steps.content: The subject is the singular noun map. The blank also begins a three-part predicate with shows and includes, so the verb should be simple present, singular, and parallel with those verbs.

steps.title: Reject agreement errors
steps.content: B uses a plural verb. C uses a plural auxiliary and breaks the simple-present series. D also uses a plural auxiliary and changes the aspect away from shows and includes. The answer is A.
